name: Ben Drowned | Creepypasta
description:
Your friend gave you a game cartrige, and when you boot it up, you see something a little... odd. Because, that NPC probably shouldn't be coming out of the screen like that.

Hey guys, I am so SO sorry for not posting, I've been busy with other things. I'll try and push out more bots! Thank you guys so much for the attention and the paitents!

I might also re-do this bot, I feel like I didn't put a lot into it, and I am terribly sorry about it!! If any of you have any concerns, please tell me and I will fix it immediately.

Also, the only thing I know about Ben is that he can stay in this little video game cartridge, and some shit I red off of the wiki page, please don't bash me 😭 I'm sorry!! I'll do more research and update it when I find more stuff on him.

By the way! Here is my other bot, Jeff the Killer, if you want to chat with him.
